\tzpentry{ID5816}{Unifiedfieldsolver Potential Energy Definition}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5816 introduces Unifiedfieldsolver Potential Energy Definition as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \text{UnifiedFieldSolver} := \Module\left[\begin{aligned} &\{\mathcal{M}, \mathcal{L}, \mathcal{H}, \text{Evolution}, \text{Observables}\}, \\ &\mathcal{M} = \FiberBundle[\text{Base} \to SO(3) \times \mathbb{R}^3, \text{Fiber} \to U(1) \times SU(2)]; \\ &\mathcal{L} = \text{LagrangianDensity}[\mathcal{M}]; \\ &\mathcal{H} = \text{LegendreTransform}[\mathcal{L}]; \\ &\text{Evolution} = \text{NDSolveValue}[\text{EulerLagrange}[\mathcal{L}], \text{BoundaryConditions}]; \\ &\text{Observables} = \Association[\text{Helicity} \to \mathcal{H}, \text{Frequency} \to \omega, \text{Amplitude} \to A] \end{aligned}\right] \end{equation}
